# demo/nodes — the shared demo_runtime library.
#
# Holds the hand-written node implementations (CounterNode, DriverNode,
# TickerNode, ObserverNode, IncrementerNode) + demo_codecs, plus the
# canonical platform runtime (platform/runtime/) and the nanopb demo
# proto. Every generated per-process app (demo/p1, demo/p2, demo/p3)
# links this as `demo_runtime` via `add_subdirectory(../nodes ...)`.
#
# Node logic is NOT generated by `artheia gen-app-composition` — only
# the per-process main.cc scaffold is. This dir is the runtime the
# generated mains link against.

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.16)
project(demo_runtime C CXX)

set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 17)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)
set(CMAKE_CXX_EXTENSIONS OFF)
set(CMAKE_POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE ON)

# Repo-relative anchors (demo/nodes/ is two levels under the repo root).
set(_REPO ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../..)
set(PLATFORM_RUNTIME ${_REPO}/platform/runtime)

set(RUNTIME_SRCS
    ${PLATFORM_RUNTIME}/src/Clock.cc
    ${PLATFORM_RUNTIME}/src/Logger.cc
    ${PLATFORM_RUNTIME}/src/TimerService.cc
    ${PLATFORM_RUNTIME}/src/NodeRef.cc
    ${PLATFORM_RUNTIME}/src/TipcMux.cc
)

# nanopb protos (C). demo/system/system.pb.c is the demo message set;
# platform_runtime/runtime.pb.c is the control-plane LogLevelPush codec
# (#386) that platform/runtime/include/GenServer.hh #includes. Both are
# generated by nanopb_generator (host-installed, in the venv):
#   nanopb_generator -I <dir> -D <dir> <file>.proto
set(PROTO_SRCS
    ${_REPO}/platform/proto/system/demo/demo.pb.c
    ${PLATFORM_RUNTIME}/proto/platform_runtime/runtime.pb.c
)
set_source_files_properties(${PROTO_SRCS} PROPERTIES LANGUAGE C)

# Hand-written node impls. DriverNode / ObserverNode / IncrementerNode
# are class templates (definitions in <node>.tcc, included from .hh), so
# only the non-template nodes contribute .cc here; template
# instantiations land in the app TU that names them.
set(NODE_SRCS
    counter_node.cc
    ticker_node.cc
)

add_library(demo_runtime STATIC
    ${RUNTIME_SRCS}
    ${PROTO_SRCS}
    ${NODE_SRCS}
)
target_include_directories(demo_runtime PUBLIC
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}            # demo/nodes — the node headers
    ${PLATFORM_RUNTIME}/include
    ${PLATFORM_RUNTIME}/proto              # platform_runtime/runtime.pb.h (#386)
    ${_REPO}/platform/proto                # system/demo/demo.pb.h
    ${_REPO}/gateway/libs/libgw/include    # gw_proto.h (via NodeRef.hh)
    /usr/include
)
target_link_libraries(demo_runtime PUBLIC
    pthread
    -l:libprotobuf-nanopb.a
)
